nameConstraints.description: Starts with letter, alphanumeric + underscores only

optionalSchemaFields.secondaryDisplayProperties: Properties displayed below primary (first one becomes index page filter)
optionalSchemaFields.requiredProperties: Properties mandatory when creating a record
optionalSchemaFields.associatedObjects: Array of standard objects: CONTACT, COMPANY, DEAL, TICKET or custom objectTypeIds

primaryDisplayProperty.description: Must reference a string property in the properties array

propertyRules: Same format as standard CRM properties — see property_types.json
autoAssociations: Custom objects are automatically associated with emails, meetings, notes, tasks, calls, and conversations

compatibility.workflows: Enterprise tier — custom object workflows support standard actions
compatibility.lists: Enterprise tier — segment by custom object properties
compatibility.reports: Enterprise tier — single-object and cross-object reports
compatibility.dynamicPages: Enterprise tier — CMS dynamic pages from custom object data
